Node.help: Range of multiple ATM settings for fine grained configuration

PropertyString.name: encapsulation
PropertyString.description: The type of ATM transport encapsulation.

PropertyString.name: mac
PropertyString.regexDescription: This is not a correct MAC address.
PropertyString.description: Base value used when as first MAC address in the range.

PropertyString.name: incrementBy
PropertyString.regexDescription: The value must have the same form as the MAC address.
PropertyString.description: Incrementor used to generate intermediary MAC addresses for a range.

PropertyInt.name: mtu
PropertyInt.help: Maximum Transmission Unit. The largest packet that a given network medium can carry. Ethernet, for example, has a fixed MTU of 1500 bytes, ATM has a fixed MTU of 48 bytes, and PPP has a negotiated MTU that is usually between 500 and 2000 bytes.
